name: SplitButton
description: A combined primary action button with a secondary dropdown menu. Use when a main action has several related secondary options.
instructions: Compose as SplitButton.Root > SplitButton.Content + SplitButton.Action. Place a Dropdown.Root inside SplitButton.Action with a SplitButton.ActionButton as the Dropdown.Trigger (use asChild). The emphasis and size on SplitButton.Root apply to both sections. Always provide aria-label on SplitButton.ActionButton describing what the secondary options are.
